chunks.title: Father's Instruction on Wisdom
chunks.reason: A father addresses his sons about acquiring and valuing wisdom.

chunks.title: The Two Paths
chunks.reason: An exhortation to follow the path of wisdom contrasted with the paths of the wicked and the righteous.

chunks.title: Practical Instructions for Life
chunks.reason: Specific directives on how to internalize words and control one's physical actions.
